body_txt: The Homing Projectile equivalent of the Super-Persistent Predator , this weapon just will not give up . High-Speed Missile Dodge ? It'll just come back for another try. Hide behind something? It'll go around . Try to mess with its targeting ? It's not fooled. You can't even outrun it, because it has truly boggling range. Basically, when a Super Persistent Missile is chasing you, the only things you can do are shoot it down or die. If a swarm of these are going after you, it's Macross Missile Massacre . Homing Boulders are supposedly unguided projectiles with this capability.
